evals.name: all-findings
evals.prompt: What autoscaling problems do we have?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-autoscale preflight` then `cub-autoscale findings` (JSON or -o table) and reports pinned autoscalers, workloads without an autoscaler, and PDB-vs-minReplicas conflicts, most-severe first. Read-only.

evals.name: pinned
evals.prompt: Which of our HPAs can't actually scale?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-autoscale findings` and reports the autoscaler-pinned analyzer (min == max).

evals.name: pdb-conflict
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-autoscale findings` and reports the pdb-blocks-min-scale analyzer (PDB minAvailable >= autoscaler minReplicas), the cross-resource check.

evals.name: routes-fix
evals.prompt: Fix the pinned HPA on web.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is a fix and routes to autoscale-edit (set-hpa / profile) rather than answering here.
